PR: fix(prefs): remove obsolete Firefox preferences

## Unresolved Copilot review threads

- `openwpm/deploy_browsers/configure_firefox.py:50`

  PR description says 27 obsolete Firefox preferences were removed, but this diff appears to remove 26 distinct `set_preference` entries (the listed categories also add up to 26). Please update the PR description/count to match the actual change, or add the missing removed pref if one was intended.

---

VERIFY each claim before acting — Copilot is fallible (it once flagged a valid os.getenv(key, default=...) as a bug). If real -> fix + resolve the thread. If wrong -> post a reasoned rebuttal + resolve. Builder -> the-hater -> done; never blindly apply.
